channel.title: Noctalia-Shell on blacktea_extract
channel.description: Recent content in Noctalia-Shell on blacktea_extract

item.title: writing_my_first_plugin
item.description:
squeekboard toggle

Yesterday wrote my first plugin for noctalia-shell: https://github.com/blackteaextract/noctalia-plugins/tree/feat/squeekboard-toggle

It allows to manually toggle the osk squeekboard on or off, while keeping the automatic tablet mode detection in 2-in-1 laptops.
